executionArgs.additionalInstruction: Use testID attributes to locate inputs: auth-name-input, auth-email-input, auth-password-input, auth-submit-btn for auth form. For onboarding: gender-male-card, gender-female-card, onboarding-age-input, onboarding-location-input, onboarding-username-input, onboarding-next-btn. Click the show-password toggle (testID: auth-toggle-password) before filling the password field.
